Bus Timings

F13 Bus Schedule Dubai Mall Metro Landside to 8 Boulevard Walk Tower

March 4, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F13 provides a vital connection between the Dubai Mall Metro Landside and 8 Boulevard Walk Tower, offering convenient access to some of Dubai’s key landmarks. The bus operates with a focus on punctuality and frequent service, ensuring passengers can rely on it for timely transportation.

Route Name F13
Route Description Dubai Mall Metro Landside · 2 - 8 Boulevard Walk Tower - Dubai Mall Metro Landside · 2
Total Distance Approximately 5-7 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 9 minutes
Operational Hours 06:00 to 23:24 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F13

Bus F13 Route in Dubai

Bus F13 operates with the following schedule:

Bus F13 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F13 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus F13 is generally affordable, with ticket prices typically around AED 3. This pricing provides an economical option for daily commuting and visiting local attractions, making it accessible for a broad range of passengers. Additionally, the convenience of frequent service ensures that the cost-effective journey fits well into various schedules and travel needs.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no dedicated online booking system for Bus F13. The app also provides information on bus stops and fare details, ensuring a smooth travel experience. For further convenience, passengers can pay using Nol cards at the bus stops and on the bus itself.

Bus Route

The F13 bus route connects two major points:

  1. Dubai Mall Metro Landside · 2

  2. Dubai Mall Metro Landside · 1

  3. The Dubai Mall

  4. Dubai Fountain Street

  5. The Palace Hotel

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. 8 Boulevard Walk Tower

  2. Dubai Mall Metro Landside · 2

This route offers access to high-traffic areas, shopping destinations, and the Dubai Fountain, making it a convenient option for exploring these attractions.

Bus F13 Station Overview

Dubai Mall Metro Landside · 2

Dubai Mall Metro Landside Station is a key transportation hub located adjacent to the Dubai Mall, one of the city’s major shopping and entertainment destinations. This station is well-equipped with amenities such as ticketing services and sheltered waiting areas. Its proximity to the Dubai Mall and the Burj Khalifa area makes it a convenient stop for both shopping enthusiasts and tourists exploring central Dubai. The station’s strategic location supports high passenger volumes, especially during peak shopping hours and events.

8 Boulevard Walk Tower

The 8 Boulevard Walk Tower station is a crucial transit hub situated in the heart of the Boulevard area, which is renowned for its residential and commercial developments. Positioned close to key attractions and office buildings, this station offers essential services for both daily commuters and visitors.

It features modern amenities such as comfortable waiting areas and real-time schedule updates, ensuring a smooth and efficient travel experience. Additionally, the station intersects with Bus Route 26, enhancing connectivity and providing convenient access to various destinations within the city. Its central location makes it an ideal point for reaching nearby amenities and destinations.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The F13 bus route in Dubai passes several notable tourist attractions and destinations: 1.

2.

3.

  1. 8 Boulevard Walk Tower: This location is part of the Downtown Dubai district, which is home to a mix of residential and commercial properties, contributing to the vibrant urban atmosphere.

Journey Experience

Along Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard, passengers can enjoy the lively atmosphere filled with luxury hotels, fine dining, and boutique shops. The journey concludes at 8 Boulevard Walk Tower, a sleek residential building in a quieter part of the city, offering a peaceful contrast to the vibrant surroundings. Despite its length, the route showcases Dubai’s blend of world-class attractions and urban life, making it a memorable experience.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily reach 8 Boulevard Walk Tower, the furthest point on the F13 bus route starting from Dubai Mall Metro Landside · 2. The price for a ride to this destination ranges from AED 22 to AED 25, offering a convenient and affordable option for reaching one of Downtown Dubai’s key locations.

The F13 bus offers a reliable and affordable transportation option between Dubai Mall Metro Landside and 8 Boulevard Walk Tower. Understanding the schedule and fare structure will help you make the most of your journey on Bus F13, whether you’re commuting for work or exploring Dubai’s vibrant neighborhoods.

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 4, 2026.
